description_long: This house features a whimsical, storybook-like design with a steeply pitched, multi-gabled roof covered in brown shingles, some of which appear damaged or missing. The exterior walls are clad in weathered blue wooden planks, giving the structure a rustic and aged appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch with a wooden railing and steps, as well as a partially constructed or deteriorated pergola. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some missing panes or boarded up, and a prominent triangular gable with decorative trim sits above the main entrance. The roofline is highly irregular, with dramatic slopes and a large, jagged hole on one side, suggesting disrepair or abandonment. Architectural details such as exposed beams, overhanging eaves, and a mix of window shapes contribute to the house's eclectic and slightly eerie character.
description: A whimsical, weathered blue wooden house with a steep, multi-gabled brown shingle roof, irregular lines, and a covered front porch. The structure shows signs of age and disrepair, with missing roof sections and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a covered porch, steps, and a partially constructed pergola, as well as the prominent triangular gable and several windows.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the steep gable, asymmetrical roofline, and two windows at ground level, with the pergola structure visible extending from the side.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the large, jagged hole in the roof, a boarded-up window, and the overall irregularity of the roof and wall lines.
description_view_3: The right side view displays another steep gable, a single window, and the overhanging eaves, with the porch and pergola partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, wooden railing, partial pergola, and decorative gable trim
